rows.label: qev026003_MSG0021
rows.name:
Come on, come on. Go and defeat that Welkin Aquila
with a big bang using the weapon I lent you, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0022
rows.name:
If you do that, it'll appeal to everyone just how strong Ma-non weapons are,
and our business negotiations should wrap up nicely, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0001
rows.name:
Good work!
I've received the report on your battle results with the new product, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0002
rows.name:
Come on, come on. First, please return
that weapon to me, ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0003
rows.name:
As expected of your skills, yo!
I wasn't wrong to ask you for this promotion, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0004
rows.name:
Making it look like you were struggling a bit for dramatic effect
was a brilliantly cheeky touch, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0005
rows.name:
"No matter how formidable the opponent,
overcome your predicament with weapons from the Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares!" [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0006
rows.name: ...I just thought of that catchphrase, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0007
rows.name:
Eh!? Yes, yes, this is the place to request
that unbeatable weapon currently rumored about in the city, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0008
rows.name:
You catch on fast, customer! Yes, this new product is the very weapon
rumored to have obliterated that Welkin Aquila in an instant, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0009
rows.name:
Ah! Welcome to you over there too, customer!
Welcome to the Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0010
rows.name:
Leading the cutting edge with the best technology in the universe!
They're the ultra weapons of us Ma-non, kara!
We absolutely won't let you regret this, yo-! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0011
rows.name:
Amazing, yo! What an astonishing promotional effect, yo!
I didn't think it would be this immediate, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0012
rows.name: This is all thanks to you, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0013
rows.name:
If anything comes up in the future, I'll contact you first, yo!
I want us to remain good business partners, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0014
rows.name: The Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares always provides sincere service! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0015
rows.name: Prospering business! Coexistence and co-prosperity! Sincerity creates the future! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0016
rows.name:
From paper napkins to interstellar spaceships!
For all your item needs, feel free to rely on the
trusted and proven Candid & Credible House of Fine Wares-! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0023
rows.name:
Come on, come on. Go on and quickly defeat those 10 Iron Femina Suids
using the weapon I lent you, yo ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0024
rows.name:
If you do that, it'll appeal to everyone just how strong Ma-non weapons are,
and our business negotiations should wrap up nicely, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0017
rows.name:
You catch on fast, customer! Yes, this new product is the very weapon
rumored to have wiped out a horde of Iron Femina Suids
with overwhelming performance, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0018
rows.name:
Good work, no na!
I've received the report on your battle results with the new product, yo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0019
rows.name:
Come on, come on. First, please return
that weapon to me, ne! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev026003_MSG0020
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Ah, I can't receive it if you've still got it fully equipped, sa.
It'd be a big help if you unequipped it first, yo ne! [ST:wait ]
